content.en:
Martial arts arena.

Ye Tian came here and was going to take the Heavenly Soul Fruit here, so that he could maximize the power of the Heavenly Soul Fruit and thus gain more promotions.

In the martial arts arena, Ye Tian's comprehension was improved, and the Heavenly Soul Fruit once again improved Ye Tian's comprehension, and made Ye Tian's divine soul instantly enter the passage of ten thousand years.

The cultivation has officially begun!

At this time, Ye Tian was comprehending the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, and the originally obscure Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique was little by little penetrated under the Heavenly Soul Fruit and Ye Tian's own comprehension, super-comprehension talent, and the assistance of the martial arts arena.

Only ten days had passed in the outside world, and Ye Tian was assisted by the Heavenly Soul Fruit, as if he had cultivated for ten thousand years, and it was ten thousand years of high-speed cultivation.

"The Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique is directly complete!"

Ye Tian said overjoyed.

If he hadn't borrowed the Heavenly Soul Fruit, he wouldn't know how many years it would take to comprehend the Black Wind Domain Realm Technique to the Consummation Realm, but now he had succeeded in only ten days.

Not only that, but he had also cultivated the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging to the level of the Eighth Technique, which was only one step away from the highest Ninth Technique.

The eighth technique of the Nine Soul Forging Techniques compressed Ye Tian's Divine Soul many times, just like a qualitative change, the Divine Soul Defense was too strong, and the potential had increased a lot, but the overall total number of Divine Souls had not increased much.

After all, the Nine Techniques of Soul Forging were only a secret technique for testing, not a real cultivation technique, so it could not make Ye Tian's Divine Soul greatly increase the total amount.

Strictly speaking, Ye Tian's Divine Soul Realm has not improved, but the quality has increased many times.

After the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique was completed, Ye Tian re-condensed the Black Wind Mountain Peak Command.

Soon, he completely refined the Black Wind Mountain Peak Master and became the true Black Wind Mountain Reserve Peak Master.

Rumble!!!!

The Black Wind Mountain Peak Lord Commander took Ye Tian's consciousness across the layers of space and descended to a certain inheritance space in the inheritance land of Black Wind Mountain.

Here, Ye Tian obtained the inheritance of the Black Wind Mountain Reserve Peak Master and some permissions.

At this time, Ye Tiancai knew what permissions and benefits the Black Wind Mountain Preparatory Peak Master had.

First of all, he can enter the space of the inheritance land and browse a large number of secret art classics, all the classics that are under the authority of the preparatory peak master, he can browse for free, only the classics of the peak master and above, he is not qualified to view.

But even so, Ye Tian has gained too many benefits.

With the help of the Black Wind Mountain's texts, he could completely increase his own background infinitely, so that he could create a true cultivation method for himself.

Moreover, he could also learn some truly powerful secret techniques that belonged to the Black Wind Mountain Preparatory Peak Master.

In short, the Black Wind Mountain Preparatory Peak Master has obtained too many benefits.

The classic space of the inheritance of the Black Wind Mountain.

Looking at the countless classics here, Ye Tian longed to soak here for hundreds of millions of years, but when he thought that he still had a lot of things to do, he was not ready to stay here longer.

"Book Spirit, come out!"

Ye Tian called out.

He learned from the inheritance information that the Black Wind Mountain Inheritance Classics space has a book spirit, and the book spirit can manage the classics here.

He didn't know if the original war would have annihilated the book spirit here, but if he thought about it carefully, it shouldn't be possible, otherwise this classic space would not exist.

Wow!

A white book appeared out of thin air, and a small figure appeared on it, which was none other than the book spirit.

"Prepare Peak Master Ye Tian, hello!"

Shuling said respectfully.

Seeing Shu Ling, Ye Tian immediately asked, "Shu Ling, is there any information about other forces here?"

"Yes!"

The spirit of the book answered.

Immediately, Shu Ling gave Ye Tian a book, which was a general information about the other forces in the domain realm.

From this book, Ye Tian roughly knew the composition of the forces in the domain realm.

The forces of the domain realm are divided into the lower three heavens, the middle three heavens, and the upper three heavens, for a total of nine heavens.

The First Heaven Force, the weakest force must also have a True Ancestor, the Second Heaven Force must have a top-level True Ancestor and more than ten True Ancestors, and the Third Heaven must have an ordinary Dao Ancestor and hundreds of True Ancestors.

For example, the Heavenly Ape Sect seems to be very powerful, but in fact it is only a dual heaven force, and it is a very weak force in the domain realm.

It can be seen from this that the forces of the Middle Triple Heaven and the Upper Triple Heaven are very powerful, but the introduction of the forces here does not explain too much about the forces of the Middle Triple Heaven and the Upper Triple Heaven, which obviously belongs to a relatively high-level secret.

"Shuling, is there an introduction to the Red Dragon Dojo?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"Yes!" the book spirit nodded.

Not long after, Shu Ling took out a very thin and ancient book and sent it to Ye Tian.

There is very little introduction to the Red Dragon Dojo above, because the Red Dragon Dojo is not a real force, it is just a dojo of an elder of the Middle Triple Heaven Force.

This elder is naturally the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor!

But after Ye Tian consulted this classic, his expression suddenly became uncertain.

The reason is that the reputation of the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor is very bad, if it weren't for the blessing of the Middle Triple Heaven Force, he doesn't know how many powerful Dao Ancestors have been killed.

The reason why the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor had a bad reputation was because he controlled many geniuses and let these geniuses serve him, and the way he controlled the geniuses was the Red Dragon Pool.

The Red Dragon Pool is indeed a treasure land, but the Red Dragon Pool is for the transformation of geniuses, and while transforming geniuses, there will be a special force that invades the souls of geniuses and slowly makes them loyal to the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor.

However, the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor was also very knowledgeable, and would not provoke the forces of the Middle Triple Heaven and the Upper Triple Heaven, and only dared to provoke some scattered cultivation geniuses or geniuses of the Lower Triple Heaven.

Originally, the strength of the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor was nothing at all in the domain realm, and he was not qualified to get the attention of the Black Wind Mountain, but what the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor really attracted the attention of the outside world was that he had a True Ancestor Grand Monarch in his hands, all of whom were True Ancestors with genius achievements.

This army of True Ancestors, combined with the strength of the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor, was enough to encircle and kill the Dao Ancestor who was much stronger than him.

But the classics of Black Wind Mountain do not have a high evaluation of him, which shows that Black Wind Mountain does not care about a mere Red Dragon Dao Ancestor, which also indirectly shows the strength of Black Wind Mountain.

At the very least, Ye Tian still didn't know how strong the Black Wind Mountain was and how powerful the Ten Kings of the Black Wind Mountain were.

"Fortunately, I became the reserve peak master of Black Wind Mountain, otherwise I entered the Red Dragon Pool without knowing it, and maybe the boat really capsized in the gutter!" Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't dare to guarantee that his copying talent would be able to protect his soul, and if he was really controlled, he would be wronged!

"Jiong, as the spirit of the Red Dragon Dojo, is really uneasy, it probably wants to control those true monarchs. However, I can take this opportunity to make some gains!"

Ye Tian suddenly thought.

Immediately, his consciousness returned to his body and walked out of the martial arts arena.

Then, Ye Tian left the Red Dragon Dojo, leaving only one incarnation here.

In this way, it is also for the sake of safety, he doesn't know how much strength Jiong can exert in the Red Dragon Dojo, in case he exerts his strong strength, it is dangerous for him to stay here.

And the incarnation is different, if you die, you will die, and it will have no effect on his body.

"Jiong, come out!"

Ye Tian's avatar said softly.

Jiong didn't come out, it was impossible for anyone to call him out, he had to come out.

"Jiong, if you don't come out, don't blame me for telling the secret of the Red Dragon Pool!"

Ye Tian said again.

Wow!

A figure appeared, it was the Jiong of the Red Dragon Dojo!
